author: Kimeko McCoy
title: Philadelphia Cream Cheese pulls dollars from search – people aren’t Googling ‘cream cheese’
description: Philadelphia Cream Cheese has stopped paying for search ads, at least to prospective shoppers on Google. Over the past year, the Kraft Heinz-owned CPG brand has phased out its traditional search ad spend, opting to put those dollars instead into retail media …

author: Andrew Byrd
title: Higher Programmatic CPMs Drove 44% Revenue Growth For The Guardian US
description: Conversations around publisher revenue have been gloom and doom over the past couple of years. But here’s a bit of good news: The Guardian US grew its programmatic revenue by 44% year over year in February. That’s an outlier in a market where many publishers …
